name: White Chili
recipeIngredient: 2 Whole Boneless Skinless Chicken Breasts, cut into 1/2-inch cubes
2 Medium Green Bell Peppers, seeded & chopped
2 15.5 Oz Cans Great Northern Beans, drained & rinsed
2 Cans Chopped Green Chiles, drained (4.5 oz)
recipeInstructions:
1. Spray a nonstick Dutch oven or large skillet with cooking spray. Heat over medium-high heat until hot.
2. Add chicken, onions, bell peppers, and garlic; cook until the chicken is no longer pink.
3. Add the remaining ingredients. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat; simmer, uncovered, for 10-15 minutes or until the sauce thickens slightly.
